name: ASRock WRX90 WS EVO EEB Workstation Motherboard - Socket sTR5 - Supports ECC R-DIMM DDR5 up to 7600+(OC) - 7x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - 2x MCIO Connector - 2x SlimSAS - 2x USB4 Type-C - Intel Dual 10Gb LAN - Dedicated IPMI LAN - DisplayPort 1.1a
shortName: ASRock WRX90 WS EVO EEB Workstation Motherboard - Socket sTR5
description: High-end workstation motherboard for EPYC processors with multiple PCIe 5.0 slots and ECC memory support.
